nasb.text: In those days Jesus came from Nazareth in Galilee and was baptized by John in the Jordan.

esv.text: In those days Jesus came from Nazareth of Galilee and was baptized by John in the Jordan.

cnv.text: 那時候耶穌從加利利的拿撒勒來，在約旦河裡受了約翰的洗。

ccb.text: 那时，耶稣从加利利的拿撒勒来约旦河接受约翰的洗礼。

csbs.text: 在那些日子里，耶稣从加利利的拿撒勒来，在约旦河里受约翰的洗礼。
